vocabulary.name: Royal Mail API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Domain vocabulary for Royal Mail shipping, tracking, and logistics APIs.

terms.label: Online Business Account
terms.definition: A Royal Mail account type required to access the Shipping V2 and label generation APIs. Enables account customers to create shipments and produce labels programmatically.

terms.label: Order Identifier
terms.definition: A unique integer identifier assigned by the Click and Drop system to each order upon creation.

terms.label: Order Reference
terms.definition: A customer-defined string reference for an order, up to 40 characters.

terms.label: Tracking Number
terms.definition: A Royal Mail barcode/tracking number assigned to a shipment, used for track-and-trace purposes.

terms.label: Manifest
terms.definition: A formal declaration of all orders despatched in a given collection, submitted to Royal Mail to confirm shipment. Manifesting is required before items enter the Royal Mail network.

terms.label: Manifest Number
terms.definition: A unique integer identifier returned after a successful manifest operation, used to retrieve manifest paperwork.

terms.label: Service Code
terms.definition: A short alphanumeric code identifying a specific Royal Mail postal service, e.g. TRM24 for Tracked Returns 24.

terms.label: Package Format Identifier
terms.definition: A string identifying the size format of a package. Accepted values include: undefined, letter, largeLetter, smallParcel, mediumParcel, largeParcel, parcel, documents.

terms.label: Local Collect
terms.definition: A Click and Collect delivery option allowing parcels to be collected from participating Post Offices or Royal Mail Customer Service Points.

terms.label: Barcode
terms.definition: A machine-readable Royal Mail identifier affixed to a shipment for sorting and tracking. Can be pre-allocated for offline use via the Barcode Allocation API.

terms.label: CN22
terms.definition: A customs declaration form required for international small packets and printed papers sent outside the UK. Completed for items valued under a threshold.

terms.label: CN23
terms.definition: A detailed customs declaration form required for international parcels sent outside the UK, typically for higher-value or commercial items.

terms.label: Import One-Stop Shop Number
terms.definition: An EU VAT registration number that allows businesses to declare, collect, and pay VAT on distance sales of imported goods to EU consumers.

terms.label: Economic Operators Registration and Identification Number
terms.definition: A unique identifier assigned to businesses that import or export goods in the EU and UK customs territory.

terms.label: Delivery Duty Paid
terms.definition: An Incoterm where the seller/shipper is responsible for paying all customs duties and taxes associated with an international shipment.

terms.label: Despatch
terms.definition: The act of sending an order into the Royal Mail network, typically confirmed by manifesting the order.

terms.label: Continuation Token
terms.definition: A pagination cursor token returned with paginated API responses, used to retrieve the next page of results.

terms.label: Safe Place
terms.definition: A delivery instruction specifying a secure location where a parcel can be left if the recipient is not available.

terms.label: Consequential Loss
terms.definition: Optional additional compensation cover, in GBP, for the potential consequential loss arising from a delayed or lost item.

terms.label: Advance Import Reference
terms.definition: A reference number used for B2B orders shipping from Great Britain to Northern Ireland under the Windsor Framework.
